## Summary
- [ ] Title follows the conventional commits format (`type: short description`)
- [ ] Linked issue/reference: <!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Testing
Provide evidence for any automated or manual testing performed.

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Deployment
- [ ] Preview deployment link added (Vercel)
- [ ] Supabase migrations reviewed/applied
- [ ] Environment variable changes documented in `docs/deployment/final-report.md`

## Checklist
- [ ] Documentation updated as needed
- [ ] Secrets added/rotated in GitHub, Supabase, and Vercel dashboards (no secrets committed)
- [ ] Rollback plan evaluated for this change
